_comment: Curated watchlist of elite, recurring programs that generic feeds miss.
These are PUBLIC programs, so this file is safe to commit in a public repo.
sources/programs.py reads it; the LLM scorer ranks each against Mohith's
profile, so the elite ones rise and stale ones sink. To curate: add/edit an
object below. Set 'deadline' (YYYY-MM-DD) only when you KNOW the date; leave
it null otherwise and describe the typical window in 'description'.

programs.title: Google Summer of Code (GSoC)
programs.description: Global remote open-source program with a stipend. Contribute to a major org over the summer. Elite resume credential for an AI/ML builder. Applications typically open March-April; org list lands in February.

programs.title: Outreachy Internships
programs.description: Paid (~$7000), fully remote, 3-month open-source internships. Two cohorts per year (around February and August). Strong for international exposure and a real FOSS track record.

programs.title: MLH Fellowship
programs.description: 12-week remote software-engineering / open-source fellowship with a stipend, run in batches across the year. Project-based, portfolio-building, strong peer network.

programs.title: Microsoft Learn Student Ambassadors
programs.description: Rolling global student program: build community, earn Microsoft/Azure credentials and swag, climb tiers (Beta -> Gold). Direct Microsoft brand signal and a path into the Microsoft ecosystem.

programs.title: GitHub Campus Experts
programs.description: Rolling program training students to build technical communities on campus. GitHub credential, public speaking + leadership development, and a global network.

programs.title: NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute (DLI)
programs.window: Self-paced; free credits via events (GTC) and Ambassador program
programs.description: Hands-on, certificate-bearing courses in deep learning, CUDA, LLMs and generative AI. Free seats frequently via GTC and the University Ambassador program. Recognized NVIDIA certificate.

programs.title: Kaggle Competitions
programs.description: Ongoing ML competitions (incl. Google-partnered ones). Real leaderboard results, prizes, and a portfolio that AI employers recognize. Pick an active comp that matches your stack.

programs.title: Google Gen AI Exchange / Build with AI (APAC)
programs.window: Seasonal cohorts; APAC editions via GDG
programs.description: Google's generative-AI upskilling + hackathon programs (Gemini, Vertex AI), often run in APAC through Google Developer Groups. Hands-on GenAI building with a Google credential.

programs.title: Microsoft AI Skills Fest / Learn Challenges
programs.description: Time-boxed Microsoft Learn challenges and AI skill events that award badges and discounted/free certification vouchers. Fast, free, resume-relevant AI/Azure credentials.

programs.title: IBM SkillsBuild — AI Credentials
programs.description: Free IBM courses and digital credentials in AI, data, and cloud, with periodic student cohorts and hackathons. Recognized IBM badges at zero cost.

programs.title: Hugging Face — Courses, Events & Community
programs.description: Free, high-quality courses (LLMs, agents, deep RL) plus frequent community sprints and events. The center of gravity for open-source AI — directly aligned with AI-agent/LLM work.

programs.title: AWS Educate / AWS AI & Cloud Programs
programs.description: Free AWS cloud + AI learning, labs, and credits, plus contests like DeepRacer Student. Cloud credentials that pair well with AI engineering and backend skills.

programs.title: Anthropic — Builder & Research Programs
programs.description: Anthropic's developer/builder programs, hackathons, and research/fellowship opportunities around Claude and AI safety. Frontier-lab credential; highly aligned with AI-agent ambitions.

programs.title: Google STEP Internship
programs.description: Google's software-engineering internship for 1st/2nd-year students — paid, mentored, and a direct line into Google. Applications usually open in the autumn for the following summer.

programs.title: Amazon ML Summer School (India)
programs.description: Free, intensive ML training taught by Amazon scientists for B.Tech/M.Tech/PhD students at recognised Indian institutions (graduating 2026/2027). No prior ML needed; selection via SOP + online assessment. Amazon credential + SWAG, and a path toward Amazon roles.

programs.title: Flipkart GRiD
programs.description: Flagship national engineering challenge (software/ML/robotics tracks) with a high-stipend internship and strong full-time CTC for winners. One of India's most prestigious campus competitions — elite resume signal.

programs.title: Amazon HackOn (India)
programs.description: Amazon's India machine-learning / software hackathon with cash prizes and interview fast-tracks. Strong AI-themed problem statements and a direct line into Amazon's hiring funnel.

programs.title: Walmart Sparkathon / CodeHers
programs.description: Walmart Global Tech's India hackathons (Sparkathon; CodeHers for women) with real product problems, cash prizes, and internship/PPO opportunities.

programs.title: Microsoft Imagine Cup
programs.window: Annual cycle, rounds through the academic year
programs.description: Microsoft's global student startup/tech competition with a strong AI track, Azure credits, mentorship, and a big prize. Perfect for a builder-with-startup-mindset — turn a project into a venture.

programs.title: Microsoft Engage / India Internships
programs.window: When offered (watch Microsoft India student careers)
programs.description: Microsoft India's mentorship-driven student engagement and internship pipeline. When a cohort is offered it's a direct mentored route into Microsoft; otherwise track the student careers page for openings.

programs.title: Adobe India — Research & Internships
programs.description: Adobe India research internships and the Adobe India Hackathon — applied AI/ML on real creative-tech problems, strong mentorship, and a recognised brand for a portfolio.

programs.title: Samsung PRISM (India)
programs.description: Samsung's Research Institute India student R&D program: real AI/ML/systems 'worklets' mentored by Samsung engineers, a stipend, certificate, and patent/publication potential — remote-friendly and resume-strong.

programs.title: LFX Mentorship (Linux Foundation)
programs.description: Paid, remote open-source mentorships across major CNCF/AI projects (Kubernetes, PyTorch, etc.). Like GSoC/Outreachy but year-round — elite OSS track record and a global maintainer network.

programs.title: OpenAI — Residency & Programs
programs.description: OpenAI's Residency and research/engineering programs — a frontier-lab pathway for exceptional builders pivoting into AI research. Rare and elite; worth tracking even if a stretch today.

programs.title: Meta AI — University Programs & Internships
programs.description: Meta's student AI/ML research and engineering internships and university programs (incl. PyTorch ecosystem). Top-tier lab exposure and a major resume signal.
